sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37833" key="e)pagkwni/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπαγκων-ίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n37833.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cushion,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:108(98)" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.108(98)</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
